channel.title: Hook mapping on PrestaShop Developer Documentation
channel.description: Recent content in Hook mapping on PrestaShop Developer Documentation

item.title: Home page
item.description: Home pageHooks available on the Hummingbird home page. The header and footer hooks listed here are shared across all pages. Hook Documentation displayAfterTitleTag Reference displayAfterBodyOpeningTag Reference displayBanner Reference displayNav1 Reference displayNav2 Reference displayTop Reference displayNavFullWidth Reference displayWrapperTop Reference displayContentWrapperTop Reference displayContentWrapperBottom Reference displayWrapperBottom Reference displayFooterBefore Reference displayFooter Reference displayMyAccountBlock Reference displayFooterAfter Reference displayBeforeBodyClosingTag Reference

item.title: Category page
item.description: Category pageHooks available on the Hummingbird category (product listing) page. Hook Documentation displayLeftColumn Reference displayHeaderCategory Reference displayFooterCategory Reference

item.title: Product page
item.description: Product pageHooks available on the Hummingbird product page. Hook Documentation displayProductActions Reference displayProductAdditionalInfo Reference displayAfterProductThumbs Reference displayReassurance Reference displayLeftColumnProduct Reference displayRightColumnProduct Reference displayFooterProduct Reference displayCardModalContent Undocumented displayCardModalFooter Undocumented

item.title: Cart page
item.description: Cart pageHooks available on the Hummingbird cart page. Hook Documentation displayShoppingCart Reference displayCartExtraProductActions Reference displayReassurance Reference displayShoppingCartFooter Reference displayCrossSellingShoppingCart Reference

item.title: Checkout flow
item.description: Checkout flowHooks available across the Hummingbird checkout steps: personal information, shipping, payment, and order confirmation. Hook Documentation displayPersonalInformationTop Reference displayCustomerAccountForm Reference displayCheckoutSummaryTop Reference displayReassurance Reference displayBeforeCarrier Reference displayAfterCarrier Reference displayPaymentTop Reference displayPaymentByBinaries Reference displayPaymentReturn Reference displayOrderConfirmation Reference displayRightColumn Reference displayOrderConfirmation2 Reference

item.title: Login & account creation
item.description: Login & account creationHooks available on the Hummingbird login and account creation pages. Hook Documentation displayCustomerLoginFormAfter Reference displayCustomerAccountFormTop Reference displayCustomerAccountForm Reference

item.title: My account
item.description: My accountHooks available on the Hummingbird customer account pages. Hook Documentation displayCustomerAccount Reference displayOrderDetail Reference displayAdditionalCustomerAddressFields Reference

item.title: Contact page
item.description: Contact pageHooks available on the Hummingbird contact page. Hook Documentation displayContactLeftColumn Reference displayContactRightColumn Reference displayContactContent Reference displayGDPRContent Undocumented
